title: Nami Answers Jinbe
description: On pages 7–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is nami answers jinbe.
scene: The scene follows nami answers jinbe, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ryuuguu Palace, shell tower

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is his majesty still refusing to leave shell tower ...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes... He claims that he cannot trust himself to control his urges...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Lock the door tight!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And do not open it until my murderous desires have passed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The culprit was wielding a gun...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...so the soldiers fired on him...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: On the human ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I would have murdered the culprit... even had he been unarmed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...minister of the left...

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: OTOHIME WOULD... NEVER FORGIVE ME FOR THAT...

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: Nobody can know where the chain of hatred begins ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They merely become a part of it with each new act of murder...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the eyes of the children who witness this grow dry and cold...

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: ...In my head... I can understand the reason behind OTOHime's words. The theory, I understand...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But why must I be denied the opportunity to kill the murderer of my wife...?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: My heart refuses to accept it!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I have averaged any number of comrades on the battlefield in the past....!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: I have taken the lives of many humans who made themselves my enemy....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is why I always felt that I had no right...

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: ...to aid in Otohime's efforts. Why I did nothing but watch...

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Why must the innocent Otohime die, whilst I live on...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I do not have the right to continue what she began... It would be too full of contradictions....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But, your majesty, a person's heart is a fickle thing ...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: We are all filled with contradictions. Both fishmen and humans.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are some things that only a warrior can protect...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your majesty!! There has been a strange incident!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What exactly is going on...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These letters keep following me wherever I go!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: This is the fifth letter already, Father!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: A LOVE LETTER?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Shirahoshii is only six years old!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Who is this wander decken?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The latest in a long line of pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: do not take the children to the funeral.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The assassin may still have accomplices lurking in the area.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And see to it that this decken is captured at once!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The ocean forest

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ... *BZZ* ... people of fish-man island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The monitor ...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: PRINCE FUKABOSHI !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Fukaboshi ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: My mother told me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...that she believed we could still reach...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...the light of the sun.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Someone knows it

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Our scars may run too deep...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to heal in time for the next reverie, which is only two years away.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But there will be another in six years, and still another in ten.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will fulfil our mother's final wish ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...even if it takes us our entire lives.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...your highnesses ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I do not doubt that this incident will have swayed many people's hearts.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As such, I will cast aside those signatures which survived the fire!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We will start over from the beginning.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So I ask only that one day...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When the scars on your hearts have healed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You can join us once more...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...in our dreams of the sun....!!!

summary: Nami Answers Jinbe. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
